message:

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "litellm-13711-bug-litellm-incompatible-with-newest-release-of-openai-v1-100-0",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "litellm: [Bug]: litellm incompatible with newest release of openAI v1.100.0",
+    "description": "[Bug]: litellm incompatible with newest release of openAI v1.100.0. This issue affects 28+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify litellm troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your litellm deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review litellm configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant litellm configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm\nkubectl get configmap -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litellm\n```\n### What happened?\n\nOpenAI just released v1.100.0. LiteLLM allows for openAI package to be any version >= `>=1.99.5`, including `v1.100.0`."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Bug]: litellm incompatible with newest release of openAI…",
+        "description": "I noticed the stacktrace is missing in   message. Attaching here if it could help with tracking down relevant references - \n```\n  File \"litellm/__init__.py\", line 20, in <module>\n    from litellm.llms.custom_httpx.http_handler import AsyncHTTPHandler, HTTPHandler\n  File\n```yaml\nFile \"litellm/__init__.py\", line 20, in <module>\n    from litellm.llms.custom_httpx.http_handler import AsyncHTTPHandler, HTTPHandler\n  File \"litellm/llms/custom_httpx/http_handler.py\", line 16, in <module>\n    from litellm.litellm_core_utils.logging_utils import track_llm_api_timing\n  File \"litellm/litellm_core_utils/logging_utils.py\", line 7, in <module>\n    from litellm.types.utils import (\n  File \"litellm/types/utils.py\", line 42, in <module>\n    from ..litellm_core_utils.core_helpers import map_finish_reason\n  File \"litellm/litellm_core_utils/core_helpers.py\", line 8, in <module>\n    from\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [Bug]: litellm incompatible with newest release… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n litellm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I noticed the stacktrace is missing in   message. Attaching here if it could help with tracking down relevant references - \n```\n  File \"litellm/__init__.py\", line 20, in <module>\n    from litellm.llms.custom_httpx.http_handler import AsyncHTTPHandler, HTTPHandler\n  File \"litellm/llms/custom_httpx/http_handler.py\", line 16, in <module>\n    from litellm.litellm_core_utils.logging_utils import",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "File \"litellm/__init__.py\", line 20, in <module>\n    from litellm.llms.custom_httpx.http_handler import AsyncHTTPHandler, HTTPHandler\n  File \"litellm/llms/custom_httpx/http_handler.py\", line 16, in <module>\n    from litellm.litellm_core_utils.logging_utils import track_llm_api_timing\n  File \"litellm/litellm_core_utils/logging_utils.py\", line 7, in <module>\n    from litellm.types.utils import (\n  File \"litellm/types/utils.py\", line 42, in <module>\n    from ..litellm_core_utils.core_helpers import map_finish_reason\n  File \"litellm/litellm_core_utils/core_helpers.py\", line 8, in <module>\n    from litellm.types.llms.openai import AllMessageValues\n  File \"litellm/types/llms/openai.py\", line 36, in <module>\n    from openai.types.responses.response import (\nImportError: cannot import name 'Respon"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
